name: Supported Languages
body: [{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"What languages are supported by Findify?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Findify supports languages for a large portion of the world's native speaking population. We offer widely spoken languages such as English, Spanish, and Chinese and also less commonly used languages."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here is a full list of the languages supported by Findify:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Arabic"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Chinese"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Czech"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Danish"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Dutch"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"English"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Estonian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Finnish"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"French"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"German"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Hebrew"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Hungarian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Indonesian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Italian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Japanese"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Latvian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Norwegian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Polish"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Portuguese"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Romanian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Russian"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Slovak"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Spanish"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Swedish"}]}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":" Note:","code":true}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"We are adding languages to this list on an ongoing basis. If you have a suggestion related to this topic, please email it to ","code":true},{"type":"a","url":"mailto:support@maropost.com","children":[{"code":true,"text":"support@maropost.com"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
